```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement acceptance tests with BDD given-when-then style"
---
# Acceptance Tests
## Task
Write acceptance tests in given-when-then BDD style.
## Requirements
1. Define feature scenarios in plain language.
2. Implement step definitions with pytest-bdd or behave.
3. Map steps to API calls or UI interactions.
4. Test acceptance criteria from user stories.
5. Keep scenarios at the business logic level.
## Constraints
- Scenarios should be readable by non-developers.
- Don't encode implementation details in scenarios.
- Keep step definitions reusable across scenarios.
## Success Criteria
- Acceptance criteria are automated and verified. Scenarios read naturally.
```
